<!-- Generated by pnpm run docgen. Do not edit directly. -->

`script` gives scripts access to the current script's lifecycle, diagnostics, and session-backed options.

## Members

<a id="member-script-exit"></a>

### `script.exit()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/app/src/renderer/windows/game/scripting/ScriptApi.ts#L682" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: app/src/renderer/windows/game/scripting/ScriptApi.ts:682" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

Intentionally exits the current script, optionally logging out and closing the owning game window during teardown.

```ts
script.exit(options?: ScriptExitOptions): Effect.Effect<never, ScriptExecutionError | BridgeError, never>
```

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `options` | <a href="/scripting/types/script-exit-options/" data-script-type="script-exit-options"><code>ScriptExitOptions</code></a> |  |  |

**Yields:** `never`

**Errors:** `ScriptExecutionError` \| <a href="/scripting/types/bridge-error/" data-script-type="bridge-error"><code>BridgeError</code></a>

### `script.signal` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/app/src/renderer/windows/game/scripting/ScriptApi.ts#L668" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: app/src/renderer/windows/game/scripting/ScriptApi.ts:668" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

Current script cancellation signal; aborted when the script stops.

```ts
script.signal: AbortSignal
```

**Returns:** `AbortSignal`

<a id="member-script-sleep"></a>

### `script.sleep()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/app/src/renderer/windows/game/scripting/ScriptApi.ts#L678" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: app/src/renderer/windows/game/scripting/ScriptApi.ts:678" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

Waits for milliseconds and cancels when the script stops. Prefer this over homemade `setTimeout` helpers to avoid background timers that keep running after the script is stopped.

```ts
script.sleep(ms: number): Effect.Effect<void, ScriptExecutionError, never>
```

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `ms` | `number` | <span class="required-mark" role="img" aria-label="Required"></span> |  |

**Yields:** `void`

**Errors:** `ScriptExecutionError`

<a id="member-script-stop"></a>

### `script.stop()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/app/src/renderer/windows/game/scripting/ScriptApi.ts#L674" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: app/src/renderer/windows/game/scripting/ScriptApi.ts:674" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

Stops the current script.

```ts
script.stop(reason?: string): Effect.Effect<never, never, never>
```

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `reason` | `string` |  |  |

**Yields:** `never`

**Errors:** `never`
